title: Section 6
content: 1[2[3[The Corporation]]], with the previous approval of 4[5[Central Government]], may, from time to time by order in the Official Gazette, alter or amend any order made under section 5.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, s. 9, for certain words (w.e.f. 13-1-2012). 2. Subs. by Act 67 of 1993, s. 5, for section 4 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993). 3. Subs. by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, s. 2, for "The Corporation" (w.e.f. 13-1-2012). 4. Subs. by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, s. 2, for "Central Government" (w.e.f.13-1-2012). 5.Subs. by Act 10 of 2022, s. 2, for "Government" (w.e.f. 22-5-2022).
